description_long: This is a shirtless adult male with a muscular build, covered in numerous tattoos on both arms and his back. He wears a red patterned bandana covering his lower face and a chunky gold chain necklace. His hair is styled in a topknot, and he has black cargo shorts with one leg longer than the other, paired with white sneakers. The figure's arms and torso are heavily tattooed, with visible designs including faces and script. Accessories such as a wristwatch and bracelets are also present, contributing to a modern urban streetwear look.
description: A tattooed, shirtless adult male with a topknot, red bandana, gold chain, black cargo shorts, and white sneakers, exuding a modern urban streetwear style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the red bandana, gold chain, tattoos on both arms, and the asymmetrical cargo shorts.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the topknot hairstyle, facial profile, and detailed tattoos on the left arm.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back tattoos, topknot, and the fit of the cargo shorts.
description_view_3: Right side view emphasizing the right arm tattoos, wrist accessories, and the side profile of the shorts and sneakers.
attribute_clothing_type: urban streetwear with cargo shorts, face bandana, and gold chain necklace
